data.name: Legs Wide Open
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Legs Wide Open

An opulent, masked-night fantasy where you direct the scene. Choose your performers, set the stage, guide the pleasure, and call the final shot—playable in both VR and non‑VR.

  • An invitation-only masquerade fantasy with bizarre masks, candlelit corridors, ritual opulence, and a hush of forbidden indulgence in purple, crimson and gold.

  • Chiaroscuro lighting and soft bloom for skin highlights, with slow, intimate camera motion to heighten mood.

  • A downtempo, sensuous soundtrack and muffled ambience to amplify the feeling of forbidden luxury.

  • Choose your setup: a man or futanari partner, plus one or two women, then pick a themed location.

  • Quickies: handcrafted, bite-sized scenes tuned for instant gratification—pick a setup and jump straight to the action.

  • Explore pose sets, including venue‑exclusive positions that reflect each environment’s character.

  • Use custom interactions: spanking, breast touch, hip grabbing, and full‑body caress to shape the experience.

  • Fill each performer’s Pleasure Bar by performing their preferred poses and touches.

  • Unlock the Moneyshot finisher when the bar is full and select from multiple finale poses.

  • Reactive feedback through animations, vocal responses, and meter surges helps you read what they like.

  • Dedicated voiceover: hours of responsive dirty talk, breathy moans, and reactive vocal cues that evolve with your choices and the Pleasure Bar.

  • Preset cinematic angles for quick, beautifully composed shots.

  • Free‑camera mode to float, frame, and time your own moves like a director.

  • Cut cleanly between angles to build your perfect sequence without breaking the mood.

Invitation‑only desire—your mask, your rules.

data.short_description: An opulent, masked-night fantasy where you direct the scene. Choose your performers, set the stage, guide the pleasure, and call the final shot—playable in both VR and non‑VR.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • Processor: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
